bugs.description: 13 A1 grammar worksheets have e1q1–e1q8 multiple-choice questions with no entries in window.EXPLANATIONS. Wrong-answer feedback shows only "Not quite." — no explanation. Pedagogy rule: every question must have an explanation.
bugs.repro: Open any A1 grammar worksheet → click a wrong answer in Exercise 1 → feedback shows "Not quite." with no explanation text
bugs.suggested_fix: Add e1q1–e1q8 keys to window.EXPLANATIONS in each affected worksheet. Example: "e1q1": "Adjective NEVER takes -s: two blue eyes (not blues)."

bugs.description: The .game-term element (the word being tested) is hidden behind the sticky navigation bar when the game play screen first loads. Term top=12px, sticky nav bottom=70px — the student cannot see which word they are answering for.
bugs.repro: Open any game.html → click Start → observe the term/word area is covered by the sticky header.
bugs.suggested_fix: Add scroll-margin-top or padding-top to .game-play container equal to the sticky nav height (~70px). Or call window.scrollTo(0, 0) after game starts and ensure .game-play has top padding.

bugs.description: 19 slides pages use ⚠ (U+26A0) in Note panels. CLAUDE.md bans all emojis in content and UI; only ◐ ◑ ◆ are permitted.
bugs.repro: Open any grammar slides.html → scroll to a "Note" box → see ⚠ symbol
bugs.suggested_fix: Replace ⚠ with "Note:" text label, or use a CSS ::before pseudo-element on .deck-note that renders a non-emoji indicator.

bugs.description: game.html only defines LEVEL, CHAPTER_ID, STORAGE_KEY — window.GAME_DATA is completely missing. game.js logs a warning and the game renders with no terms to answer. Worksheet and slides were cherry-picked correctly.
bugs.repro: Open es/a1/gramatica/have-got/game.html → click Empezar → console: "GAME_DATA not defined" → no questions appear
bugs.suggested_fix: Add window.GAME_DATA to have-got/game.html with items matching the have got grammar concepts from slides.html (affirmative/negative/question forms, short answers, contractions). Use articulos/game.html as template.

errors: BUG-004: GAME_DATA was missing — fixed by adding 10 have-got grammar items
